levels.name: Report Only
levels.description: May inspect records and write reports. May not modify canonical or generated records.

levels.name: Derived File Repair
levels.description: May regenerate derived files from canonical records. May not change truth-bearing records.

levels.name: Mechanical Canonical Edit
levels.description: May make deterministic edits to canonical records where meaning cannot change.
examples: add missing derived count when computable

levels.name: Draft Institutional Change
levels.description: May create draft truth-bearing or governance records for human review. May not activate them.

levels.name: Human Approval Required
levels.description: Reserved for truth-bearing changes, publication readiness, constitutional changes, and final challenge outcomes.
